# azure-functions-python-cookbook

> Practical recipes and examples for Azure Functions Python v2.

## Package Info

- Repository: https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-python-cookbook
- Version: 0.1.2
- Python: >=3.10, <3.15
- License: MIT
- Docs: https://yeongseon.github.io/azure-functions-python-cookbook/

## What It Provides

Content-first cookbook for Azure Functions Python v2 with curated recipe docs and matching runnable
examples. This repository documents practical trigger patterns and architecture decisions; it does not
provide a runtime API library.

## Recipe Categories

- HTTP: request/response, routing, auth, webhook, and multi-tenant patterns
- Timer: scheduled jobs with NCRONTAB and timezone behavior
- Queue: producer/consumer messaging with Azure Storage Queue
- Blob: blob processing via polling and Event Grid triggers
- Service Bus: enterprise queue processing pattern
- Event Hub: stream ingestion and event processing
- Cosmos DB: change feed-triggered processing
- Patterns: blueprints, retries, idempotency, identity, and performance tuning
- Durable Functions: orchestrations, entities, retries, determinism, and testing
- AI: MCP server recipe on Azure Functions
- Local Dev: local run and direct invocation workflow

## Trigger Patterns Covered

- HTTP
- Timer
- Queue
- Blob
- Service Bus
- Event Hub
- Cosmos DB
- Durable Functions

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-python-cookbook.git
cd azure-functions-python-cookbook
make install
make check-all
```

## Documentation

- Product requirements: `PRD.md`
- Design principles: `DESIGN.md`
- Contributing guide: `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- Published docs: https://yeongseon.github.io/azure-functions-python-cookbook/

## Ecosystem

Part of **Azure Functions Python DX Toolkit**:

| Package | Role |
| --- | --- |
| [azure-functions-openapi](https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-openapi) | OpenAPI spec generation and Swagger UI |
| [azure-functions-validation](https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-validation) | Request/response validation and serialization |
| [azure-functions-db](https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-db) | Database bindings for SQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and Cosmos DB |
| [azure-functions-langgraph](https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-langgraph) | LangGraph deployment adapter for Azure Functions |
| [azure-functions-scaffold](https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-scaffold) | Project scaffolding CLI |
| [azure-functions-logging](https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-logging) | Structured logging and observability |
| [azure-functions-doctor](https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-doctor) | Pre-deploy diagnostic CLI |
| [azure-functions-durable-graph](https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-durable-graph) | Manifest-first graph runtime with Durable Functions *(experimental)* |
| **azure-functions-python-cookbook** | Recipes and examples |
